taskTemplate.name: Deliver Note
taskTemplate.description: Deliver the executed promissory note based on loan disposition

subTaskTemplate.name: Deliver to Secondary
subTaskTemplate.description: Deliver to Secondary – Deliver the note to the secondary market investor per delivery instructions.

subTaskTemplate.name: Add Loan Number to First Page
subTaskTemplate.description: Add Loan Number to First Page – Add the loan number to the first page of the note before delivery to operations.
subTaskTemplate.type: Deliver Note – Add Loan Number to First Page

subTaskTemplate.name: Upload to Identifi
subTaskTemplate.description: Upload to Identifi – Upload the note to Identifi.

subTaskTemplate.name: Send to Operations
subTaskTemplate.description: Send to Operations – Send the note to operations for portfolio retention.
